title: Callista jenkinsii
taxonomy: Callista jenkinsii is a species of sea snail, specifically a marine gastropod mollusk in the family Veneridae. This classification places it within the phylum Mollusca, class Bivalvia, and order Veneroida. The family Veneridae is a group of saltwater clams and related species. Callista jenkinsii is further classified as a genus and species within the Veneridae family, indicating its specific place within the broader classification. The classification of Callista jenkinsii reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other bivalve mollusks.
